rationale: The cited paper appears in a single grouped citation used to note that positive contamination can occur (alongside another source), before the authors pivot to negative contamination effects. The citing paper's theory, hypotheses, and mechanism tests are built primarily on other contagion references (especially negative contamination work), with no direct reuse or extension of the 2008 paper's specific findings. Because this citation functions as broad background context rather than a distinct building block, it is best classified as a passing mention.
